rows.label: tlk70000056_05_msg0001
rows.name: Are you really going to fight?

rows.label: tlk70000056_05_msg0002
rows.name:
You'll come back soon, right?
You won't disappear, or d...die,
will you?

rows.label: tlk70000056_05_msg0003
rows.name:
I've decided to become a Driver.
So there are lots of things
I want to ask you all.

rows.label: tlk70000056_05_msg0004
rows.name:
Me and da and Kei'll be waiting
here when you get back, kay?

rows.label: tlk70000056_05_msg0005
rows.name:
Saying goodbye is the
worst. I hate it.
